MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS. TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT SHEHADEH, SAMIH

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER C.A.C.V. OF COLORADO, L.L.C.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD CONTINUED FROM MAY-07-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-04-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO JUNE 4, 2008 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, L.L.C.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED BASED ON DEFENDANT'S UNDISPUTED DECLARATION OF LACK OF NOTICE. C.C.P. SECTIONS 1286.2(A)(1) AND 1286.4. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
